analysis.reasoning: Core message: Lavrov claims the West wants Russia to be a 'convenient' territory for advancing its own interests, but Russia will maintain an independent foreign policy defending national interests and justice internationally. Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Yes—portrays the West as self-serving and attempting to subordinate Russia, casting Russia as resisting Western imposition. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): Partially—while it asserts independent foreign policy and upholding justice, it doesn’t explicitly showcase alternative institutions or multilateral leadership; focus is on autonomy rather than leading a system. So not strong enough. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner): Some overlap with 'upholding justice,' but no partnership/peace/solidarity framing or cooperation examples; not applicable. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not historical. RU5 (Russia at world’s forefront): No concrete success claims. RU6 (Culture/nature): Not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1 only.
